featureName: BUG-058-DEDUP-KEY-OWNER-ISOLATION: dedup_key omits owner_user_id, enabling cross-tenant dedup collapse

executionHistory.summary: Chaos probe of the spec 058 dedup surface found that ComputeDedupKey (internal/connector/ingest/dedup.go:36) omits owner_user_id and raw_ingest_dedup.dedup_key (migration 040) is a global PRIMARY KEY. ResolveOrPublish UPDATE/INSERT both key on dedup_key alone with no owner predicate, so two authenticated owners sharing a (url, content_type, source_device_id, bucket) tuple collapse onto one row: the second owner's publish is skipped and the first owner's artifact_id is returned. Verified by code reading at HEAD; live-Postgres reproduction needs the integration harness (BLOCKER-2, resolved 2026-06-05).

Filed bug.md (mechanism + reproduction + recommended design-owned fix + open questions), spec.md (5 acceptance criteria), report.md. Routed to bubbles.design because the dedup key tuple is planning truth (design §2.3) and the sibling BUG-058-EXTERNAL-INFRA-MISSING explicitly scopes the dedup keyer as a stable contract. Not fixed in-round; the Round-18 charset hardening (F1) narrows but does not resolve this.
Operator ratified per-owner dedup namespacing (it is never correct for owner B to receive owner A's artifact_id). Single bugfix-fastlane scope; SCN-058-022..026 authored in scenario-manifest.json.

owner_user_id written FIRST into the ComputeDedupKey preimage (5-arg signature); single caller internal/api/connectors/extension/ingest.go passes the server-authenticated owner with a fail-loud empty-owner guard (owner_required). No schema migration (dedup_key stays BYTEA PRIMARY KEY).

Scenario-first red->green: TestComputeDedupKey_VariesByOwner + TestDedupStore_CrossOwnerIsolation FAIL with owner absent from preimage, PASS after. Added TestIngest_RejectsItemWithoutOwner (handler fail-loud) + tests/integration/extension_dedup_owner_isolation_test.go (live-Postgres, CI-run). go build ./... + go vet + go test -race green.
All pre-existing ingest + extension keyer tests preserved; TestComputeDedupKey_VariesByDevice (Chrome Sync single-owner-multi-device canary) still PASS. ingest 12/12, extension 40/40.
Additive preimage write + one localized caller guard; no new abstractions or dead branches.
Deterministic keyer; -race clean; no new perf hot path.

Owner namespace is the server-authoritative auth.Session.UserID (never client-supplied); empty owner is fail-loud; the cross-tenant artifact_id disclosure vector is closed at the source. No framework files touched.
artifact-lint PASSED; state-transition-guard 0 BLOCKs for the packet. Evidence in report.md Validation Evidence.
Diff confined to keyer + caller + their tests + one new integration test; no migration; no .github/bubbles changes.
Keyer doc comment documents the owner-isolation guarantee; parent design §2.3 amended + parent report closure note + resolvedBugs entry.

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane single-scope preimage-namespacing fix; no convergence loop required

resolvedFindings.summary: dedup_key omitted owner_user_id; global PRIMARY KEY allowed cross-tenant dedup collapse when two owners shared a source_device_id value
resolvedFindings.resolution: owner_user_id folded FIRST into the ComputeDedupKey preimage (no schema change); the single caller passes the server-authenticated owner with a fail-loud empty-owner guard; unit (VariesByOwner) + store (CrossOwnerIsolation) + handler (RejectsItemWithoutOwner) + live-Postgres (TestPostgresDedupStore_CrossOwnerIsolation, CI-run) regression cover added. TestComputeDedupKey_VariesByDevice preserved.
resolvedFindings.evidence: report.md Test Evidence (red->green); internal/connector/ingest/dedup.go ComputeDedupKey(ownerUserID, url, contentType, deviceID, bucket); internal/api/connectors/extension/ingest.go owner guard.
